cards.title: Material testing guidance
cards.description: Standardised testing framework per material type. What tests, what labs, what it costs. Educational content.

cards.title: Standardised classification selector
cards.description: Replace free-text material with structured classification. MRTS04 general earthworks as primary, MRTS05 unbound pavements for quarried materials, AS3798 for residential/commercial. Needs compliance documentation framework (c-070) first.

cards.title: Routing API integration
cards.description: Replace haversine distance with real driving distance. HERE Routing API v8 validated in prototype (prototype-truck-routing.html). HERE truck restrictions don't differentiate vehicle types in AU but real road distance + NHVR overlay is the value. Parked from soft launch.

cards.title: Analytics dashboard
cards.description: Track platform usage: page views, map interactions, listing views, registration funnel.

cards.title: Logo: engage designer for C2F monogram refinement
cards.description: Take favourite concept (db9383e3.svg) to a freelance designer for production-ready vector files, all lockups, colour variations. Budget $500-1,500.

cards.title: Create LinkedIn banner
cards.description: Logo + tagline + map visual for company page banner. Needs production logo first.

cards.title: Business cards design
cards.description: Dark card stock, matte finish. Logo on front, contact details on back. Needs production logo.

cards.title: Conference pull-up banner
cards.description: 850x2000mm. Logo, tagline, value props, map screenshot, QR code. For FWD Festival and future events.

cards.title: Ignite Ideas Fund application
cards.description: Up to $100K for commercialisation. Investigate Q3 2026 round. advance.qld.gov.au/grants-and-programs/ignite-ideas-fund

cards.title: Recycling and Jobs Fund EOI
cards.description: Industry Development stream, up to $10M. EOI still open. Medium fit for Cut2Fill.

cards.title: ReMade in Queensland application
cards.description: $50K-$2.5M. Medium fit. Lower priority than Circular Economy Investment Program.

cards.title: Truck routing integration (HERE API)
cards.description: Prototype validated (prototype-truck-routing.html). HERE API works for real road distance in SEQ. NHVR overlay works. Truck-specific restrictions don't differentiate in AU. Parked from soft launch — integrate when cost engine is built.

cards.title: Spec & drawing parsing feature
cards.description: Phase 3. Receivers upload their project specification, platform parses and interprets material requirements. Clarifies ambiguities for supervisors who don't know spec details. See doc 06 section 5.2.

cards.title: Rebuild backend venv (Python 3.12 → 3.13)
cards.description: Backend venv was built on Python 3.12, system now has 3.13. Rebuild venv before migration can run locally. Required before deploy.

cards.title: Run migration 003 on Supabase
cards.description: 003_add_listings.py creates listings table with GIST index, status index, material_type index. Must run before listing system works in production.

cards.title: Deploy listing system to Render
cards.description: Backend has new listing model, schemas, router, admin endpoints. Frontend has listing markers, post form, admin tab. Review code then deploy. NOT deployed yet.

cards.title: Listing expiry
cards.description: Listings auto-expire when end date passes. Cron or check-on-load. Verify this works after deploy.

cards.title: User profile after registration
cards.description: After first login, prompt for company name, role, phone. Currently registration creates auth but no profile context.

cards.title: Facility claim for suppliers
cards.description: A supplier (e.g., Remondis) can claim their existing facility listing and manage it. Requires admin approval.

cards.title: Listing notifications
cards.description: Email when a new listing matches your area/material interest. Even a daily digest to admin would be a start.

cards.title: Move facility data to API
cards.description: Frontend hardcodes 604 facilities in app.js. Move to fetching from backend API (data already in schema).

cards.title: Update website tagline
cards.description: Replace 'Connect. Reuse. Sustain.' with 'Source. Verify. Build.' across index.html and app.html.

cards.title: Update LinkedIn company bio
cards.description: New tagline + functional descriptor: 'QLD's construction material platform.'

cards.title: Create Remondis info pack
cards.description: One-page PDF or email. Screenshot of map near their facilities, 3 bullet points, platform link, meeting CTA. See soft launch playbook section 5.

cards.title: Seed 2-3 listings from Archers network
cards.description: Need visible listings on the map before demoing to Tier 2 contacts. Source from current Archers projects.

cards.title: FWD Festival application
cards.description: Advance QLD Innovation Event Delegation. 7-9 May, Sunshine Coast. Apply at advance.qld.gov.au. Free tickets, travel at own cost.

cards.title: Circular Economy Investment Program application
cards.description: $250-750K. High fit for Cut2Fill. Active grant program. Apply now.

cards.title: ASPIRE partnership approach
cards.description: Not a competitor — general-purpose waste exchange. Council-funded across 5+ SEQ councils. Strong partnership opportunity: Cut2Fill = construction vertical, ASPIRE = general circular economy. Joint council pitches. Active partnership program at aspiresme.com.

cards.title: QLD Waste Strategy engagement
cards.description: New QLD Waste Strategy (2025-2030) being developed NOW — policy window for engagement. Cut2Fill data could support waste diversion targets. No existing mechanism for levy credits for demonstrated diversion — gap to propose filling.

cards.title: CCF QLD partnership outreach
cards.description: Civil Contractors Federation QLD. Peak body — members are primary Cut2Fill users. Highest-value relationship for platform credibility and adoption. See doc 06 section 8.2.

cards.title: Payment facilitation investigation
cards.description: Critical strategic insight: contractors can't easily pay non-registered sources. Haulage companies bundle material into per-m3 rate as workaround. Level 2 model: Cut2Fill invoices contractor, pays source minus fee. Investigate legal/financial requirements.

cards.title: Compliance documentation framework
cards.description: Map the full specification landscape (MRTS, AS, project-specific). Define testing tiers. Clarify MRTS04/05 relationship for material classification. Build compliance matrix. Prerequisite for spec matching engine. Don't over-complicate too early.

cards.title: Write purpose/mission/vision statements
cards.description: Draft exists in 00-Purpose-Mission-Vision.md. Needs founder review and refinement. Should feel like Cut2Fill, not corporate.

cards.title: Review and lock canon doc
cards.description: 00-Canon.md created with all known locked decisions. Review for accuracy and completeness.

cards.title: Split doc 07 cleanup
cards.description: 07-Product-Roadmap.md and 07b-Material-Tracking-Vision.md created. Review both, update cross-references in other docs.

cards.title: Soft launch preparation
cards.description: Platform readiness checklist from playbook. Critical punch list items mostly done. Remaining: deploy listing system, rebuild venv, run migration, update tagline, seed listings.

cards.title: Listing model + router
cards.description: Built 7 April. Model, schemas, router (POST auth'd, GET public GeoJSON, GET /mine, GET /:id). Migration 003.

cards.title: Admin listing approval
cards.description: Built 7 April. Admin panel listings tab with pending/approved/rejected filter, approve/reject buttons.

cards.title: Listing markers on map
cards.description: Built 7 April. Diamond-shaped markers (green=available, blue=wanted). Detail panel with volume, dates, material, contact, tested badge, fire ant zone check.

cards.title: Connect post form to listing system
cards.description: Built 7 April. Post form creates Listing via API if logged in, falls back to submission if not.

cards.title: Hide water fill points
cards.description: Done 7 April. addTo commented out, code and data retained.

cards.title: Fix 'Create Free Account' flow
cards.description: Done 7 April. Links to app.html#register, auto-opens register form.

cards.title: Fix footer copyright
cards.description: Done 7 April. 2025 → 2026 across index.html, app.html (3 instances).

cards.title: Hide heatmap button
cards.description: Done 7 April. display:none applied.

cards.title: Update landing page feature claims
cards.description: Done 7 April. 'Geotech Testing Framework' → 'Material Classification'. 'Live Site Status' → 'Logistics Calculator'.

cards.title: Brand brief created
cards.description: docs/12-Brand-Brief.md — logo direction, tagline, colours, typography, tone, applications.

cards.title: Tagline locked: Source. Verify. Build.
cards.description: Primary tagline approved. Secondary: Find it. Verify it. Fill it. Old tagline retired.

cards.title: AI logo exploration (30+ concepts)
cards.description: Recraft MCP. Favourite: db9383e3.svg (C2 monogram). Parked for designer refinement.

cards.title: Documentation overhaul
cards.description: Business plan, MVP spec, product decisions, feasibility, data sources, marketing plan, regulatory framework, competitive intel, material classifications all updated 7 April.

cards.title: Soft launch playbook created
cards.description: docs/12-Soft-Launch-Playbook.md — 3 tiers of contacts, demo sequence, IP protection, readiness checklist. Government engagement strategy added.

cards.title: Dev Hub created
cards.description: Local document manager with editing, git integration, journal viewer. Trello board added 7 April.

cards.title: Canon doc created
cards.description: 00-Canon.md — single source of truth for all locked decisions.

cards.title: Purpose/mission/vision drafted
cards.description: 00-Purpose-Mission-Vision.md — draft statements ready for review.

cards.title: Product roadmap extracted
cards.description: 07-Product-Roadmap.md created. 07b-Material-Tracking-Vision.md split out. Old doc removed.

cards.title: Competitor & strategic analysis
cards.description: Soil Connect deep dive, ASPIRE analysis (partnership not competitor), Rubbl clarification (equipment rental, irrelevant). Payment facilitation insight. Revenue model reframed. Grant programs identified.

cards.title: Truck routing prototype
cards.description: prototype-truck-routing.html. HERE API v8 validated for SEQ. NHVR overlay working. Parked from soft launch — preserved for future integration.

cards.title: Cost Intelligence doc updated (06)
cards.description: MRTS04/05 corrected, risk alerts expanded (8→20), spec parsing added, partnerships broadened (section 8), pre-contract sustainability value, neat-to-loose conversion noted, cost comparison example fixed.
